prompt: Create a charming hand-drawn urban snapshot in a loose naive marker-and-crayon illustration style, like a casual travel diary sketch with thick black outlines, imperfect perspective, scribbly coloring, and a white paper background. Show a young woman standing in the foreground on a busy Korean shopping street, centered from thighs up, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She wears a light gray patterned bucket hat, long dark braids, a black sleeveless strappy dress, a thin necklace, and carries a brown shoulder strap on one side while holding a black tote bag on the other; the tote has a white shell-like emblem and the word HONDA. Her pose is relaxed, one arm bent across her waist, with a fashion-street-photo feeling. Surround her with rectangular wooden planter boxes overflowing with dense bright green scribbled foliage and many small pink flowers, plus a tall brown wooden frame structure rising behind her. In the background, draw a lively commercial street with simplified stick-figure pedestrians and many overhead black utility wires crossing diagonally between poles. Include 12 readable storefront or sign texts: "dp ENTERTAINMENT" on a large white billboard, "DVB.BD" on a red vertical sign, "영화 스크린 10" on a black vertical Korean sign, "Rock.com" on a yellow-red shop sign, "Lime Br" on a red sign, "trend" on a small blue sign, "toconte" on a blue sign, a yellow parking sign with "P", a small yellow sign reading "honey", and three small partially legible colorful shop signs. Use a bright but sketchy palette with brown buildings and posts, blue awnings and window areas, red and yellow shop signs, black wires, and vivid green-and-pink planters. Keep the composition vertical, playful, cute, and slightly messy, as if drawn quickly from a phone photo in a city neighborhood.
